title: Taylors Eye Witness Oxford Kitchen 3pce Knife Set - 9cm/3.5” Paring, 13cm/5” Utility, 15cm/6” Chef Knives. Full Tang Blade, Razor Sharp, Stainless Steel. Classic Triple Brass Rivet Handle
features: ✅ PRECISION CONTROL: A trio of useful cooks tools, short, medium and long length for enhanced accuracy, precision and speed. The essential cooks starter set is truly multi-functional for vegetables, fruit, fish, meat and sushi. They are perfect for crunching or slicing with ease through flesh of hard vegetables or mincing, slicing and dicing cuts of meat. A perfect choice by chefs/cooks to aid them in every commercial or home kitchen. Great gift for a house mover.

✅ STRONG DESIGN: A single piece of metal running the full length of the knife makes it strong from handle to the knives point and offers superior durability and longevity. A Full tang knife weighs more than a normal knife and is less likely to bend. It also distributes the weight better allowing for greater knife balance and higher leverage capabilities. If you want a good knife make sure its ‘Full Tang’.

✅ ONLY THE BEST HANDLE: The well known 150 year old Taylors Eye Witness company is proud of creating only high quality kitchen tools. This is shown in the handmade craftsmanship of the knife's solid, jet black handle, with 3 x brass rivet construction, each rivet being completely smooth, lying totally flush with the surface of the handle. Great for home kitchen cooking and restaurants, cafes and hotels.

✅ SUPERIOR QUALITY STEEL BLADE: The razor sharp, stainless steel blade is high quality, increasing its hardness and corrosion resistance while giving it a shiny look finish. The blade will stay sharp for longer which is important for general use, multi-purpose knives. Heavy use, slicing and dicing of meat, fruit and vegetables is made effortless with this solid performing kitchen essential. A perfect addition to any chef or home cook's knife collection.

✅ CONVENIENT AND RELIABLE: Hand wash or dishwasher friendly, making sure that the knife is dried straight after washing to keep its shine and longevity. Taylors Eye Witness are so confident in the quality of this product that we offer a 10 YEAR "NO QUIBBLE" GUARANTEE. Any item found defective will be repaired or replaced without charge. The consumer's statutory rights are fully protected.
description: Taylors Eye Witness are proud to bring the NEW ‘OXFORD RANGE’ of classically designed knives to market. The ‘Oxford’’ kitchen knife range is produced using a traditional bolster and a full tang, triple brass rivet construction; a design which dates back over 150 years. These precision knives are produced from high quality taper ground stainless steel, creating a blade that is difficult to blunt, but easy to sharpen. The professional’s choice, Taylors Eye Witness kitchen knives are used by professional chefs all over the world. This new comprehensive range consists of 9 specialty knives and a 3 piece starter set. All ground to exacting standards by skilled craftsmen. Taylors Eye Witness, Sheffield. TIPS TO INCREASE THE LIFE OF YOUR KNIFE: Use wooden/plastic chopping boards. Sharpen blades regularly. Remove Stains with soft cloth. Don’t leave knives in dishwashers, towel dry after washing. Avoid storage in drawers.
